title: lasianthaea kingii
intro: Lasianthaea kingii, also known as the Mexican devil's claw, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family, native to the southwestern region of North America. The plant's roots and tubers possess medicinal properties, particularly in treating pain and inflammation due to their anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Lasianthaea kingii include reducing fever, relieving joint pain, and potentially treating conditions such as arthritis and gout. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
